# .github/workflows/solve.yml  okie abc xyz
name: Solve All Instances
on: [push, workflow_dispatch]

jobs:
  build-matrix:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      matrix: ${{ steps.make-matrix.outputs.matrix }}
      total: ${{ steps.make-matrix.outputs.total }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Build matrix
        id: make-matrix
        run: |
          python -c "import glob,json,os; files=sorted(glob.glob('test_data/data_demand_random_50_batch_all1_equal_random/*.dat')); A=[4,8]; L=[60,90,120]; jobs=[]; jid=0; [jobs.append({'job_id':(jid:=jid+1),'instance':f,'base':os.path.basename(f),'A':a,'L':l,'reps':3}) for f in files for a in A for l in L]; json.dump(jobs, open('matrix.json','w')); print(json.dumps(jobs))"
          TOTAL=$(python -c "import json; print(len(json.load(open('matrix.json'))))")
          echo "matrix=$(cat matrix.json)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "total=$TOTAL" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Total jobs: $TOTAL"

  solve:
    needs: build-matrix
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 200
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        task: ${{ fromJson(needs.build-matrix.outputs.matrix) }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Install deps
        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y parallel
      - name: Build solver
        run: g++ -std=c++17 C_Version/Function.cpp -O2 -o C_Version/read_data
      - name: Run task (3 procs parallel per job, solver self-timeout 150m)
        run: |
          mkdir -p results
          # Build command list for 3 repetitions of this config
          : > cmds.txt
          for r in $(seq 1 ${{ matrix.task.reps }}); do
            echo "SOL_OUT_DIR=results ./C_Version/read_data '${{ matrix.task.instance }}' '${{ matrix.task.A }}' '${{ matrix.task.L }}' > results/${{ matrix.task.base }}_A${{ matrix.task.A }}_L${{ matrix.task.L }}_r${r}.log" >> cmds.txt
          done
          cat cmds.txt
          parallel -j3 < cmds.txt
          # write per-run metadata
          python gha_write_run_meta.py \
            --results-dir results \
            --base "${{ matrix.task.base }}" \
            --a "${{ matrix.task.A }}" \
            --l "${{ matrix.task.L }}" \
            --reps "${{ matrix.task.reps }}" \
            --job-id "${{ matrix.task.job_id }}" \
            --instance "${{ matrix.task.instance }}"
      - name: Upload artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: solve-job-${{ matrix.task.job_id }}
          path: results/

  summarize:
    needs: [build-matrix, solve]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: always()
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: downloaded
      - name: Build summary
        run: |
          python -c "import json,pathlib,csv; rows=[json.load(open(p)) for p in pathlib.Path('downloaded').rglob('meta_run*.json') if p.is_file()]; out=pathlib.Path('summary.csv'); f=open(out,'w',newline=''); fields=['job_id','instance','A','L','run_index','best_fitness','best_solution','best_multi_fitness','best_multi_solution','best_drone_avg_trip_time','best_total_sortie_time','best_multi_visit_trip_count','best_drone_trip_count','best_avg_customers_per_trip','best_multi_drone_avg_trip_time','best_multi_total_sortie_time','best_multi_multi_visit_trip_count','best_multi_drone_trip_count','best_multi_avg_customers_per_trip','best_solution_file','best_multi_solution_file','log']; w=csv.DictWriter(f,fieldnames=fields,extrasaction='ignore'); w.writeheader(); w.writerows(sorted(rows,key=lambda x:(x['job_id'], x.get('run_index',0)))); f.close(); print(f'Wrote {len(rows)} rows to {out}')"
      - name: Upload summary
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: solve-summary
          path: summary.csv
